# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented milestone source-bundle lineage and staleness detection. Materialized milestones now persist the originating requirements run, milestone bundle id, schema version, and source plan hash; downstream milestone plan inspection, bead export, create-from-bead, daemon materialization, and requirements handoff paths validate that the source bundle is still current before using derived artifacts. Existing coarse question-round invalidation was left unchanged, and follow-up bead ralph-burning-epnn tracks precise per-question invalidation.","outstanding_risks":[],"steps":[{"order":1,"status":"completed","description":"Inspected the requirements invalidation path, milestone materialization path, CLI consumers, and existing tests to locate the lineage gap."},{"order":2,"status":"completed","description":"Added source_requirements_bundle metadata to MilestoneSnapshot and wired MaterializeBundleSource through requirements-to-milestone materialization paths."},{"order":3

## Steps

1. [Completed] codex implementation turn
